titleStmt.title: SII 26.328: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 328. (A.R. No. 310 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift, made by the king, of two vēli of land in the nañjai land of Kuṟumbaṉmēḍu in Iraṇḍāyiravēlippaṟṟu to the north of [Tirukkachchūr ?] to two priests in the temple of the deity Tiruvēgambamuḍaiyanāyaṉār at Kāñchīpuram viz., Kāñchai Anavaratasundara-bhaṭṭaṉ Nallanāyaṉ of Kāśyapa-(gōtra) and Kāñchīkkuṟi Śrikaṇṭha-bhaṭṭaṉ Perumānakkaṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambala-bhaṭṭaṉ of Bhāradvāja-(gōtra). The land was given as Bhaṭṭavṛitti-agaram (Bhaṭṭavṛitti-agrahāram) from the date of this inscription. The details such as the extent of each piece of land and its location in the different parts of the above mentioned Iraṇḍāyiravēlippaṟṟu, are also given. Besides the land, it is stated that the donees were given each a house-site in the residential area. A certain Muṉaiyadaraiyaṉ figures as the signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉāka koṟccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakra- vattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇḍyadevaṟku yāṇṭu 9
kku Etirāmāṇṭai Āṭi mātam tirumukappaṭi kādvipurattu Uṭaiyār tiruvekampamuṭaiya nāyaṉāraip pūjikkum
nampimāril kāñcai kāśyapaṉ Anavaratasundarabhaṭṭaṉ nallaṉāyaṉukkum kāñcikkuṟi bhāradvāji śrīkaṇṭhabhaṭṭaṉ pe
rumāṉakkaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyārkkum vaṭakkiliraṇṭāyiravelippaṟṟil kuṟumpaṉ meṭṭil nañ
cai nilattile Iraṇṭuveli nilam bhaṭṭavratti Akaramāka kuṭuttom Iṉṉāḷ mutal nilam 2 veliyāl va
nta kaṭamai Āyam poṉvari nāṭṭuvari kācu kaṭamai paṭṭi kuṟṟam kāttikai paccai maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa Iṟai
kaḷum Iḻintu bhaṭṭavratti Akaramāka kuṭuttom Inilattukku puṉṉiyamuṭaiyāṉiṭṭataṭi Uḻavarippaṭikku kāliyāṉa kaṇṇāṟṟi
l viṭṭa cattiyyāvai ku 5 100 7 10m kaḷaṅkuṇṭil ku 7 10 1(1/4)m viḷāmaṭṭam kku 100 2 10m kaḷam kiḻkuṇṭil kku 1000(1/4)1ttam kota
ṇṭaṉ kaṇṇāṟṟil maintaṉ kuṇṭil Uḻappaṭa kku3 100 10 9m Āvalpākkiḻāṉ kku100 8 10m paṉañceṟukkaṇṇāṟṟil cel
vi teṟu kku 5 100 2 10 5m kākkunāyakkaṉ kku 4 100 5 10m cittirameḻimaṭṭam kku 100 9 10 5m payaṟṟampulam kku 3 100 3 10m tomimaṭṭam kku
100 5 10m terimaṭṭam kku 100 5 10m meyye Eṅkaḷ perumāṉ kku 3 1000 5 100m puṟakālil kālukku kiḻai murukkaṉ kku 8 1000m va
rataṉ maṭṭam kku 100 6 10 5m Itaṉ vaṭakiḻai paruttippulam teṟkaṭaiya kku 100 7 10 Āka kku cattattiṉāl nilam 2lim nattattile maṉai
Iraṇṭukku kku 2 100m Ivarkaḷukku paṭṭavirutti Akaramāka cantirātittavarai celvatāka cilālekai paṇṇikkuṭuttom I
ppaṭi ceyvate Ivai muṉaiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Itu śrīmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.328 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
